context_for_next_testing_agent: PUNTO 2 (revisión) complete. ChatBot.jsx now uses presupuestador_publico MCP agent instead of direct Gemini. Endpoints: POST /api/web/chatbot (returns respuesta, session_id, disclaimer), POST /api/web/lead (MOCKED in preview). Old widget vanilla JS completely removed - /api/public/widget/* returns 404. All data-testids present for automated testing. Lead capture is MOCKED in MCP_ENV=preview.

tests: Preview returns pre_registro_id starting with preview-mock-

Disclaimer appears under bot response (italic gray)
CTA button appears after 1 user turn
Form opens inline on CTA click
All fields present (nombre, email, telefono, consent)

Success message appears with user name

mocked_apis.POST /api/web/lead: In MCP_ENV=preview, returns mock response without writing to MongoDB. This is expected behavior, NOT a bug.
